description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent gable roof and a mix of brick and siding exterior. The structure features a main entrance with a small porch, steps, and decorative columns, giving it a welcoming appearance. Multiple windows are arranged in mostly symmetrical rows, with some variations on the sides, and dormer windows are present on the upper floor. The property includes a large driveway and a detached garage with a sloped roof, as well as a landscaped yard area. The roof is dark gray, contrasting with the lighter walls and trim, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with paved walkways. The overall design suggests a blend of Craftsman and Colonial architectural influences, with practical outdoor spaces and classic residential features.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, symmetrical windows, and a welcoming porch entry. The property includes a driveway, detached garage, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with porch, steps, columns, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back patio area, rear windows, and the garage structure.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the gable end, dormer windows, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, side windows, and the landscaped yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, decorative columns, and overhanging roof
